title: Appraisal Authorization for Grape Alley Right-of-Way
summary: Department of Assessment requests authorization to hire appraiser for Grape Alley, a city right-of-way off Townsend Street south of Erie Boulevard, near the recently demolished Goodyear building site now used as a parking lot. Brief discussion with location clarification (East Fayette area, near former Snowflake Bakery).
